task_completion.description: Mount the source volume to slot 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window showing slot 1 mounted with the volume '/home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc', or terminal command mounting it to slot 1.

task_completion.description: Create a new 25MB encrypted volume using Twofish
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard showing 'Twofish' selected as the encryption algorithm and size set to 25MB, or the newly created file 'twofish_volume.hc' visible in a file manager/terminal.

task_completion.description: Mount the new volume to slot 2
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window showing slot 2 mounted with the volume '/home/ga/Volumes/twofish_volume.hc', or terminal command mounting it to slot 2.

task_completion.description: Copy all files from the source volume to the new volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing the three expected files (SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt, FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv, backup_authorized_keys) inside the mounted directory for the new volume (e.g., /media/veracrypt2).

task_completion.description: Create a migration manifest text file with filenames and sizes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/migration_manifest.txt', which must include the names of the three expected files and their corresponding sizes in bytes.
VeraCrypt main window showing slots 1 and 2 are empty/dismounted, or terminal output showing successful dismount commands for both volumes.

integrity.description: Agent actually used VeraCrypt to create and mount the volumes
integrity.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI windows (Volume Creation Wizard, main window) or valid VeraCrypt CLI commands are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent actually copied the files rather than creating empty dummy files
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager copy progress dialog, terminal 'cp' commands, or file properties showing non-zero sizes in the destination volume.

integrity.description: Agent generated the manifest with actual file sizes
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands like 'ls -l' or 'stat' used to gather file sizes, or the manifest file showing realistic byte sizes rather than placeholders.
